narrative:
W Lafayette (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,362 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
